name: How long do I have to sue Perplexity after finding my content used?
description: 3 years from discovery; document date now.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to sue Perplexity after finding my content used?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3 years from discovery; document date now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: You have three years from discovering infringement to file copyright claims against Perplexity.[1] Context: Ongoing NY cases like Dow Jones v. Perplexity highlight timely action amid AI scraping surge.[4][5] Key factors: 'Discovery rule' starts clock; document exact date you learned of use. Multiple works? Separate claims. In New York, venue sticks due to Perplexity's contacts.[1][4] Act fast before evidence vanishes; register works retroactively if needed. Consult counsel to toll statute.
